I'll first check the column names for these three tables to identify the title field, then run the counts.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name IN ('sentry_issues', 'linear_issues', 'github_pull_requests') ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position"}

text: Now I'll get all three counts in one query:

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:

  SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sentry_issues
  WHERE status = 'unresolved' AND title ILIKE '%SSO SCIM provisioning%'

  WHERE state NOT IN ('done', 'canceled') AND title ILIKE '%SSO SCIM provisioning%'
),
